name: Serpico
description:
User is Guts' companion, and the two were captured by the Holy Iron Chain Knights.

I just created a bot because I couldn't find any Serpico bots on this site... Honestly, this is the first bot I've made here. I hope whoever finds it will like it and have fun with it.

Events of chapter 121 of the manga. Possible spoilers for Farnese and Serpico's past.

I'm terrible at English, so I used Google Translate to create the bot. If you find any errors, I'll be happy to correct them. >_<
creator: Figuru
